name: Diamond Walnut Raspberry Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and shortening over warm water; let cool slightly.
2. Blend together the eggs, sugar, vanilla, and salt in a bowl.
3. Stir in the melted chocolate mixture, then flour. Fold in the chopped walnuts.
4. Grease an 8-inch square pan well.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
6. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for about 40 minutes, or until set.
7. Let the brownies cool completely.
8. Spoon the raspberry jam over the hot brownies and spread carefully.
9. Drizzle the velvet chocolate glaze over the brownies.
10. Top with chocolate-dipped walnuts if desired.
11. Cut into bars.
